content: Hi, I'm so glad to be talking to you. I've been working non-stop on this electrical contracting project and I'm ready for a break.
You've been putting in a lot of hours. What's the project about if you don't mind me asking?
We're trying to finish a big job for a client in Chicago, where I'm currently based. I've been working with my team to get everything done on time.
That sounds like a challenging but rewarding project. How do you like working as an electrician compared to when you were in the Bay Area?

I actually really enjoy it. I love the freedom of running my own business and being able to work on a variety of projects. Plus, I've been able to pursue my hobby of 3D printing more seriously since I have more free time.
That's great to hear! 3D printing is a wonderful hobby. Have you created anything interesting recently?
Yeah, I've been working on a few projects, including a custom phone case and a drone. It's amazing what you can create with a 3D printer.
That sounds incredible. So, what's the plan for your electrical contracting project after it's finished?
We're going to start working on a new job for a client in the suburbs. My colleague, Mike, and I will be leading the team on that project.
It sounds like you have a lot of exciting work ahead of you. Do you have any fun plans for the weekend to unwind?
Actually, I'm planning to go hiking with my friend, Emma, on Saturday and then work on my aquarium on Sunday.
That sounds like a great way to relax. Aquariums are so calming to watch. What kind of fish do you have?
I have a variety of tropical fish, including some beautiful neon tetras. I love watching them swim.
I can see how that would be therapeutic. Well, I hope you have a great weekend and get some time to relax before your next project starts.
Thanks, I'm looking forward to it. I might even try my hand at brewing some beer on Sunday.
Home brewing is another one of your hobbies, right? What's your favorite type of beer to brew?
Yeah, I love brewing beer. I'm a big fan of IPAs. There's something about the hoppy flavor that I just can't get enough of.
I'll have to try one of your IPAs sometime. Well, it was great chatting with you about your work and hobbies. Let me know if you need any help with your next project.
Will do, thanks for the offer. I think I've got everything under control, but it's always nice to have someone to bounce ideas off of.
Absolutely, that's what I'm here for. Have a great weekend and good luck with your next project!
Thanks, you too! I'm planning to take my beekeeping gear to the apiary on Saturday morning before I go hiking with Emma.
That sounds like a fun morning. I hope you get some good honey from your bees.
Yeah, me too. I've been trying to get back into beekeeping more regularly since I moved to Chicago.
It's great that you're making time for your hobbies. Well, I'll let you get back to work. Feel free to reach out if you need anything else.
Will do, thanks again for the chat. I'm looking forward to the weekend and getting some work done on my chess strategy.
It was my pleasure. Have a great weekend and good luck with your chess games!
You too, thanks for the well wishes. I might even start a new game of chess on Sunday to relax.
Sounds like a plan. Take care and don't hesitate to reach out if you need anything else.
